visual_description: A woman with short brown hair lies in a hospital bed covered by a pink blanket, holding a pillow. A man in a light-colored jacket sits beside the bed, then stands and leans over to place his hands on her abdomen. The hospital room contains medical equipment, monitors, and another patient in a separate bed in the background.
